Product Details
PDI Series

Air sealing profiles developed for cylinder systems that demand smooth actuation and dependable sealing contact.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

PDI Series

Developed for pneumatic cylinders that need smooth actuation, controlled friction, and reliable sealing contact during travel.

PDI series profiles are suited to pneumatic assemblies where smooth response, stable sealing contact, and practical maintenance performance all matter in day-to-day operation.

Smooth Actuation

Helps improve response smoothness in cylinders where startup and travel feel both matter.

Reliable Contact

Maintains practical sealing contact across reciprocating movement and routine service conditions.

Service Practicality

Offers a practical profile choice for standard pneumatic maintenance and replacement needs.
